SEARCH
Package clientGui.reservation

Class OrderUi_controller

java.lang.Object
clientGui.navigation.MainNavigator
clientGui.reservation.OrderUi_controller
All Implemented Interfaces:
MessageListener<Object>, BaseController
public class OrderUi_controller extends MainNavigator implements MessageListener<Object>
Controller for the Order Management UI. Allows managers/employees to view, filter, add, update, and delete orders.

      clientUi - The client UI instance
      isManager - The role of the employee
